name: Nerdy (Varsity Tutors) Learning Platform API
what_it_does: Nerdy REST API for live learning and tutoring marketplace platform (Varsity Tutors parent company). Enables AI agents to manage tutoring session booking and scheduling, handle tutor matching and availability, access learning progress and session data, retrieve student and parent profile data, manage subject and skill tracking, handle subscription and package management, access live class and group session data, retrieve learning analytics and assessment results, manage instructor and tutor management, and integrate live learning with school and LMS platforms.
use_cases: Managing tutoring session scheduling from ed-tech marketplace automation agents
Matching students with tutors from intelligent learning agents
Retrieving learning progress and assessment data from educational analytics agents
Integrating live learning with school systems from education platform agents
not_for: Traditional classroom management without marketplace tutoring and live learning focus
K-12 SIS without live learning and on-demand tutoring platform needs
Corporate training without K-12 and college prep tutoring model
best_when: An education platform, school district, or corporate learning organization integrating with Varsity Tutors/Nerdy wants AI agents to automate session booking, tutor matching, progress tracking, and learning analytics.
avoid_when: PRIVACY+COPPA: Student data — especially for minors — requires COPPA compliance and parental consent. Student learning progress and academic data is sensitive. FERPA may apply if integrated with school data. Automated tutor recommendations for minors must have appropriate guardrails.

auth.notes: Nerdy uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials with session, student, and tutor scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for session and progress events. B2B2C model with enterprise school and organization partnerships.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise education partnerships
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-session and subscription enterprise pricing for B2B partners
pricing.notes: St. Louis, Missouri. NYSE: NRDY. Founded 2007 as Varsity Tutors. Rebranded to Nerdy 2021. 40+ learning verticals. 400M+ sessions facilitated. Large online live learning marketplace. B2B partnerships with enterprises and school districts. Competes with Chegg and Wyzant for tutoring marketplace.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY+COPPA: Minor student data requires parental consent — automated data collection must verify age
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with B2B partner portal
FERPA may apply if integrated with school data — student educational records protection
Tutor matching automation must have appropriate safety controls for sessions with minors
Live session data may require recording consent laws compliance
B2B enterprise model — API access through enterprise partnership, not self-serve
agent_readiness.security_notes: Student and learning data for minors. COPPA, FERPA, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Minors' data protection.

security_score_components.security_notes: Student learning data. COPPA, FERPA, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Minors' privacy.
